title: Website Health Monitor
prompt: Create a website health monitor that curls my site every 5 minutes and alerts me on Telegram if it goes down.

title: Whale Tracker
prompt: Build a whale transaction tracker that checks DexScreener every 2 minutes for SOL transactions over $50k.

title: Daily News Digest
prompt: Create a daily news digest that fetches TechCrunch and CoinDesk at 7am, summarises top stories, and sends them to Discord.

title: Process Watchdog
prompt: Set up a process watchdog that checks if nginx is running every minute and restarts it if crashed.

title: Write a Blog Post
prompt: Write a 1000-word blog post about the future of AI agents in everyday life. Make it engaging and insightful.

title: Explain This Code
prompt: Explain how this code works step by step and suggest improvements for readability and performance.

title: Email Drafter
prompt: Draft a professional follow-up email to a client after a project demo, thanking them and outlining next steps.

title: Data Analysis
prompt: I have a CSV file with monthly sales data. Analyse the trends, calculate growth rates, and summarise the key insights.

title: Meal Planner
prompt: Create a healthy 7-day meal plan for someone who's vegetarian and doesn't like mushrooms. Include quick recipes.

title: Social Media Posts
prompt: Write 5 engaging Twitter/X posts to promote a new AI-powered productivity app. Include hashtags and a call to action.

title: Resume Builder
description: Tailor your CV for a role
prompt: Help me rewrite my resume summary and key experience bullets for a Senior Full-Stack Developer position at a startup.

title: Study Notes
prompt: Create comprehensive study notes on machine learning fundamentals, covering supervised learning, neural networks, and common algorithms.

title: Git Automation
prompt: Write a script that checks all my GitHub repos for stale branches older than 30 days and creates a report.

title: API Builder
prompt: Build a REST API with Express.js that has CRUD endpoints for managing a book collection with title, author, and rating.

title: Travel Planner
prompt: Plan a 5-day trip to Tokyo for two people on a moderate budget. Include must-see spots, food recommendations, and a daily itinerary.

title: Brainstorm Ideas
prompt: Help me brainstorm 10 unique SaaS product ideas that solve real problems for remote workers. Include a one-line pitch for each.

title: Debug My Code
prompt: I'm getting an unexpected error in my React app. Help me debug it step by step and explain what went wrong.

title: Meeting Summary
prompt: Here are my rough meeting notes. Turn them into a clean summary with key decisions, action items, and owners.

title: Learn a Language
prompt: I want to practice conversational Spanish. Start a dialogue with me as if we're ordering food at a restaurant in Madrid.

title: Cron Job Scheduler
prompt: Set up a cron job that backs up my database every night at 2am, compresses the backup, and deletes backups older than 7 days.
